name: Verify - Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to understand and work with numerical data, interpret charts, tables, and numerical information. Used for roles requiring data analysis and quantitative reasoning.

name: Verify - Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to understand and evaluate written information. Assesses critical reading and logical reasoning from text passages.

name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to identify patterns and logical rules in abstract information. Suitable for roles requiring innovative thinking and problem solving.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions from rules and premises. Key for roles needing analytical and structured thinking.

name: Verify - Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of mechanical and physical principles. Designed for engineering, technical, and trades roles.

name: Verify - Spatial Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to mentally rotate and manipulate shapes and spatial patterns. Used for engineering, design, and technical roles.

name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire. Measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to work behaviour, leadership, teamwork, relationships, thinking styles, and emotions. Industry standard for professional and managerial selection.

name: MQ - Motivation Questionnaire
description: Identifies what motivates and engages individuals at work. Covers 18 motivation dimensions including achievement, progression, recognition, and autonomy.

name: CCSQ - Customer Contact Styles Questionnaire
description: Personality questionnaire designed specifically for customer-facing roles. Assesses service orientation, empathy, resilience, and communication style.

name: Scenarios - Supervisory
description: Situational judgment test for supervisory roles. Presents realistic workplace scenarios and assesses judgment in managing teams, conflict, and performance.

name: Scenarios - Customer Service
description: Situational judgment test measuring judgment in customer service scenarios. Assesses how candidates handle difficult customers, complaints, and service situations.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Knowledge test measuring proficiency in Java 8 programming, including OOP, collections, streams, lambdas, and exception handling.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level)
description: Advanced Java knowledge test covering concurrency, JVM internals, design patterns, performance optimization, and enterprise Java concepts.

name: Python (New)
description: Measures Python programming proficiency including syntax, data structures, OOP, file I/O, and standard libraries.

name: SQL (New)
description: Tests knowledge of SQL including queries, joins, aggregations, subqueries, and database design concepts.

name: .NET Framework 4.5 (New)
description: Assesses proficiency in .NET framework 4.5, including C#, ASP.NET, ADO.NET, WCF, and related Microsoft technologies.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Measures JavaScript knowledge including ES6+, DOM manipulation, async programming, closures, and modern JS features.

name: React (New)
description: Tests proficiency in React including components, hooks, state management, lifecycle, and React ecosystem.

name: Angular (New)
description: Assesses Angular framework knowledge including components, modules, services, routing, RxJS, and Angular CLI.

name: HTML/CSS (New)
description: Tests knowledge of HTML5 and CSS3 including semantics, layout (flexbox, grid), responsive design, and accessibility.

name: Automata Pro
description: Hands-on coding simulation assessing software development skills through real coding tasks. Evaluates code quality, problem-solving, debugging, and software engineering practices.

name: SVAR - Spoken English (Indian Accent)
description: AI-powered spoken English assessment measuring pronunciation, fluency, and spoken communication skills with adaptation for Indian English accents.

name: Verify - Data Entry Speed and Accuracy
description: Measures speed and accuracy in data entry tasks. Used for clerical, administrative, and data processing roles.

name: Verify - Checking
description: Assesses clerical checking ability — comparing names, codes, and numbers for accuracy. Suitable for administrative, finance, and data processing roles.

name: Verify - Calculation
description: Measures basic numerical calculation skills including arithmetic and simple numerical operations. Suitable for clerical and operational roles.

name: Entry Level Sales 7.1 (International)
description: Comprehensive battery for entry-level sales roles measuring cognitive ability, personality, and sales-specific competencies.

name: Sales Preference Questionnaire (SPQ)
description: Measures motivation and preference for sales-related activities. Identifies candidates with genuine interest and drive for sales roles.

name: Graduate / Manager Skills Battery
description: Combined cognitive battery measuring verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning for graduate and management level candidates.

name: Verbal Concepts (VC)
description: Short verbal analogies test measuring verbal comprehension and language ability for a wide range of roles.

name: Numerical Ability (NA)
description: Short test of basic numerical ability assessing arithmetic and number series for a wide range of roles including operational and entry-level positions.

name: Work Strengths
description: Strengths-based personality assessment identifying natural strengths and energizers at work. Suitable for development and selection at all levels.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: Personality questionnaire measuring reliability, integrity, conscientiousness, and safety orientation. Used for roles in operations, manufacturing, and safety-critical environments.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32)
description: Full ipsative version of the OPQ measuring 32 personality characteristics. Provides detailed personality profile used in development and selection for professional, managerial and leadership roles.

name: Workplace English Test
description: Assesses business English proficiency across reading, writing, and language comprehension. Used for roles requiring strong written English communication.

name: Technology Professional 8.0 UK Edition
description: Comprehensive battery for technology professional roles combining cognitive ability and personality measures relevant for IT and technical professionals.

name: Verify - Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Next-generation interactive numerical reasoning test with enhanced security features and engaging item formats. Adaptive scoring. Suitable for professionals and graduates.

name: Verify - Interactive - Verbal Reasoning
description: Next-generation interactive verbal reasoning test with enhanced security and engaging formats. Adaptive scoring.

name: Verify - Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Next-generation interactive inductive reasoning test with enhanced anti-cheating features and engaging item formats.

name: Agile Methodology
description: Tests knowledge of Agile frameworks including Scrum, Kanban, and Agile principles. Used for software engineering and project management roles.

name: C++ (New)
description: Assesses C++ programming proficiency including OOP, templates, STL, memory management, and modern C++ features.

name: C# (New)
description: Assesses proficiency in C# programming including OOP, LINQ, async/await, generics, and .NET integration.

name: Data Analysis using Python
description: Tests Python-based data analysis skills including pandas, NumPy, data wrangling, visualization, and exploratory analysis.

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of machine learning concepts including supervised/unsupervised learning, model evaluation, feature engineering, and common algorithms.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) (New)
description: Tests knowledge of AWS services including EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, IAM, and cloud architecture patterns.

name: Microsoft Azure (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Azure cloud services, including compute, storage, networking, and Azure-specific solutions.

name: Cybersecurity (New)
description: Measures knowledge of cybersecurity principles including network security, threats, encryption, compliance, and security frameworks.

name: Accounting (UK)
description: Measures knowledge of accounting principles including double-entry bookkeeping, financial statements, and UK GAAP.

name: Financial Accounting (US)
description: Tests financial accounting knowledge under US GAAP including balance sheets, income statements, and accounting standards.

name: Microsoft Excel (Advanced)
description: Assesses advanced Excel skills including pivot tables, advanced formulas (INDEX/MATCH, VLOOKUP), macros, data modeling, and visualization.

name: Administrative Professional 8.0
description: Comprehensive assessment for administrative roles combining clerical checking, verbal ability, numerical ability, and personality measures.

name: Numerical Reasoning (Throughput)
description: High-volume numerical reasoning screening tool designed for rapid candidate screening in large-volume hiring programmes.

name: Verbal Reasoning (Throughput)
description: High-volume verbal reasoning screening tool designed for rapid candidate screening in large-volume programmes.

name: Inductive Reasoning (Throughput)
description: High-volume inductive reasoning screening tool for rapid large-scale hiring.

name: Situational Judgement - Manager 1
description: SJT assessing management judgment across typical people management scenarios including delegation, feedback, and team motivation.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: Situational judgment test designed for graduate-level candidates assessing workplace judgment and professional behaviours.

name: Search and Match
description: Perceptual speed and accuracy test measuring attention to detail and information processing speed. Used for roles requiring careful checking.

name: Contact Center Scenarios
description: SJT for contact center and call center roles assessing judgment in handling customer enquiries, escalations, and service scenarios.

name: Manager/Professional 7.1 Short
description: Short form cognitive battery for professional and managerial candidates covering verbal, numerical, and reasoning ability.

name: Universal Competency Report (UCR)
description: Report derived from the OPQ32 that maps personality scores to the SHL Universal Competency Framework. Provides competency-based interpretation of OPQ results.
